override_policy: A gated-compute override requires a new generated evidence artifact, an explicit compute budget, and preserved stop rules; this artifact does not override SEARCH_FRONTIER_GATE.

frontier_lanes.action: Use the generated long-span bundle gate as the source of truth; do not run broad long-span sweeps while it reports 0 of 8 gates met.
frontier_lanes.why_now: MECHANISM_EXPERIMENT_RANKING ranks seed-table-preset-probe as the top lane, with 7 ready lanes, 1 gated lanes, 2 blocked lanes, and natural-corpus compression proven False. WHOLE_STREAM_RESIDUAL_VECTOR_PROBE then tested global residual entropy and bitplane/vector channels over 2358 honest encoded rows, found 0 honest full-stream negative rows, 0 ordinary held-out negative groups, 0 control negative groups, controls null True, measured residual coding near entropy bound True, and promotion met False; EXPANDER_SALT_ENSEMBLE then tested 16 predeclared expander salts, found 0 salted exact hits against 0.648961 expected, random-trial multiplier exceeded False, 0 selected-span rows, 0 full-stream negative rows, 0 control negative groups, and promotion met False; SCHEMA_NATIVE_PUBLIC_DICTIONARIES then tested 101 frozen public entries across 7 modes, found 11302 family selected spans, 14 ordinary held-out negative groups, 0 family control negative groups, 0 wrong-schema negative groups, 0 same-size random negative groups, 0 shadow negative groups, beats generic dictionary baseline True, and promotion met True; SCHEMA_NATIVE_PUBLIC_DICTIONARY_REPLICATION then tested 20 frozen replication corpora, found 20239 standards selected spans, 9 ordinary negative groups, 2 standards control negative groups, 2 generic ordinary negative groups, claim level control_failed_on_frozen_expansion_corpora, and promotion met False; SUPERPOSITION_TELEMETRY then tested 4 deterministic fixtures with 13 candidates, retained 2 alternatives, found 4 weighted extra savings over greedy, explained 4 discarded candidates with 0 unexplained discards, and promotion met True; RECURSIVE_STRUCTURED_FIXTURES then tested 5 CLI-verified fixtures, found 0 ordinary later-win families, 0 planted offset later-win families, claim level recursive_structured_fixtures_not_promoted, and promotion met False; LONG_SPAN_BUNDLE_GATE then consolidated these signals into 0 of 8 gates met, recommendation hold_long_span_bundle_sweeps, selected-span frontier 0, best non-planted forecast 828 GiB, raw-suffix observed prefix 4 vs required 6, short-hit control groups 1, schema replication claim control_failed_on_frozen_expansion_corpora, and claim level long_span_bundle_gate_blocked_by_evidence; the queue therefore blocks broad long-span bundle sweeps. Best near miss http-headers-heldout::sub-lag-2 still expects 5.122e-08 exact hits in observed bytes, and periodic masks currently show prefix>=5 uplift in 0 held-out corpora, composed context+periodic probes show prefix>=5 uplift in 0 held-out corpora and 0 held-out exact hits, while the ladder diagnostic shows 0 held-out/control rows at prefix>=5. The fifth-byte residual diagnostic tops out at 22.7% robust XOR coverage, and residual-derived steering masks produced 0 cross-corpus prefix>=5 win rows; contextual steering checked 16 masks and produced 0 prefix>=5 win rows. Corpus generalization controls scanned 71250 spans across 6 controls and found 0 prefix>=5 rows and 0 exact hits. Vocabulary-disjoint transform validation produced 0 shadow prefix>=5 win corpora and 0 binary exact hits. The bounded structural search checked 30 candidates over 660 rows and found 0 held-out prefix>=5 win corpora, 0 held-out exact hits, and 0 binary exact hits. The byte-permutation transform search checked 7 candidates over 154 rows and found 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 rows negative after metadata. The BWT/MTF classic-preconditioner probe checked 9 candidates over 90 rows and found 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, 0 rows negative after metadata, and 6 shorter transformed-payload rows that are transform-only diagnostics. The grammar/channel match discovery checked 9 channels over 198 rows and found 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 rows negative after metadata. The numeric value-channel search then parsed 120214 values across 98 rows and found 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 rows negative after metadata. The held-out corpus expansion then audited 20 frozen replication corpora outside the canonical matrix, scanned 680395 raw spans, and found 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact-hit rows, and 0 selected-span rows. The record/context transform search checked 14 candidates over 84 rows and found 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 rows negative after metadata. The token/dictionary transform search checked 9 candidates over 126 rows and found 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 rows negative after metadata. Affine remaps searched 7937 candidates and found 16 held-out prefix>=4 win corpora, but 0 held-out prefix>=5 win corpora and 0 held-out exact hits. Residual-sidecar steering found 31 held-out forced rows and 31 rows with positive seed contribution, but 0 held-out positive net-delta rows; best held-out net delta 5 bytes. The longer-span sidecar break-even report shows raw-suffix strict gain starts at prefix 6, current held-out forced prefixes stop at 4, raw-suffix viable rows at observed prefix 0, and sublinear-model viable rows 23. Residual payload compressibility then found 1 measured held-out negative row; best measured case rust-like-heldout::affine-a003-b211::prefix4-suffix-xor with zlib best delta -101 bytes. The experimental descriptor decoded 2 rows and rejected corrupt inputs, but full-stream negative rows stayed 0 with best full delta 596 bytes. The sidecar record-overhead budget found 6 negative layout rows; best safe layout delta_offset_u8_seed_u16 reaches -489 bytes. The packed sidecar descriptor then decoded 2 rows, rejected corruption, and found 2 full-stream negative rows with best delta -485 bytes. Controls encoded 10 of 96 rows, found 4 unique negative cases and 1 ordinary held-out negative case. The generalized packed sidecar offset and seed modes encoded 48 unique source rows and 1576 mode/coder rows, but ordinary held-out negative cases stayed at 1. The packed sidecar replication control-matrix then tested 20 frozen corpora, 520 source cases, and 6240 descriptor rows, producing 0 full-stream negative rows and 0 ordinary held-out negative groups. Match discovery scanned 11154720 target spans across 42 corpora, with 0 rows at prefix>=5, 0 rows with exact hits, 0 rows with selected spans, and 0 ordinary held-out selected groups. Alignment/arity discovery then scanned 25210986 target spans across 2134 rows, with 0 rows at prefix>=5, 3480 exact hits, 0 positive exact hits, and 0 selected spans. Transformed match discovery applied 21 frozen transforms over 16494870 target spans and found 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 metadata-profitable rows. Selected-lead exact discovery then scanned 71477770 transformed target spans across 91 selected affine/periodic/composed leads and found 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 metadata-profitable rows. Blind scale-up is not justified.

frontier_lanes.action: Keep replication corpora in a separate frontier artifact unless the team intentionally accepts the expensive matrix-regeneration cascade.

frontier_lanes.action: Keep broad depth-3 structured sweeps gated after the bounded compression follow-up returned null.
frontier_lanes.why_now: The depth-3 prefix probe enumerated 16843008 seeds and found 3 held-out prefix>=5 uplift rows but 0 exact hits. The bounded follow-up ran 2 physical inputs / 3 aliases and found 0 selected spans. The selected-lead depth-3 probe found 2 prefix>=5 uplift rows, 0 exact hits, and the lead compression follow-up found 0 selected spans. Depth-3 frontier exact discovery then checked 26 frozen frontier rows / 15 payloads, with 2 prefix>=5 uplift rows, 0 exact hits, and 0 selected spans. The depth-4 shard plan is gated, estimates 5.6444 hours for the full 4-byte bucket at the depth-3 frontier rate, and gives exact-8 probability 0.00017141 on the current frontier. The pilot shard enumerated 16777216 four-byte seeds and found 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 prefix>=6 rows, 0 exact hits, and 0 selected spans. Best non-planted forecast still needs about 8.280e+02 GiB for one expected exact hit under the random-suffix model. The generated search frontier gate is hold-broad-depth-search with 0 of 7 gates met, 0 selected spans, and 0.00017141 depth-4 exact-8 probability.
frontier_lanes.promotion_gate: Promote broader depth-3 or opt-in depth-4 work only if a new lead finds prefix>=6 movement, exact hits, selected spans, negative delta, or forecast scale below 1 GiB for one expected exact hit.
frontier_lanes.stop_rule: Abort deeper search if frontier exact discovery remains prefix-only with no exact hits.
frontier_lanes.suggested_artifact: Use `docs/SEARCH_FRONTIER_GATE.md` as the broad go/no-go gate before any raw depth or full depth-4 proposal.

frontier_lanes.action: Interpret the current bounded planted-density scale sweeps before extending size.
frontier_lanes.why_now: The current 16 MiB planted-density sweep is useful performance evidence but not natural-corpus proof; it now preserves seed expansions, target windows, lookup counts, and target-table byte estimates with peak/estimated-table ratio 21.98. SCALE_PERFORMANCE reports plateau ratio spread 6.514%, largest peak memory 1934.602 MiB, and next-double peak estimate 3869.204 MiB. BOUNDED_STREAMING_MEMORY_GATE reports chunked_target_table_fixture_evidence_no_rss, target-table preflight present True, full RSS containment False, and chunked target tables True.
frontier_lanes.promotion_gate: Peak memory and runtime scale predictably without changing roundtrip or telemetry correctness, with full RSS containment or chunked target tables for promoted workloads.
frontier_lanes.stop_rule: Stop scaling if peak working set grows faster than search-work and target-table telemetry explains, or if target-table estimates exceed the configured memory limit.
frontier_lanes.suggested_artifact: Use `docs/SCALE_PERFORMANCE.md` and `docs/BOUNDED_STREAMING_MEMORY_GATE.md`; extend bounded sizes only if the current ratio stays explainable or chunked tables reduce memory.

frontier_lanes.action: Do not add transform metadata to `.tlmr` yet.

frontier_lanes.action: Do not implement production GPU acceleration until CPU evidence identifies a worthwhile target workload.
frontier_lanes.why_now: Acceleration report status is `research-only-cpu-semantics` and current non-planted exact-hit forecasts are weak.
frontier_lanes.promotion_gate: A CPU workload shows repeatable exact hits but is too slow, then GPU parity and benchmark work becomes valuable.
frontier_lanes.stop_rule: Stop GPU work if it cannot beat CPU streaming on the promoted workload under parity tests.

unresolved_clusters.first_remaining_gate: Treat prefix-4 movement as a steering clue only; require residual-sidecar savings, prefix>=5, or exact hits before depth escalation.
Find profitable exact hits or prefix>=5 movement before spending more on alignment-only tuning.
Treat BWT/MTF/RLE as null seed-span evidence unless it produces prefix>=5, exact hits, or metadata-profitable selected spans.
Treat byte-distribution alignment as null until it produces prefix>=5, exact hits, or metadata-profitable selected spans.
Reject composition as a promotion path unless it produces held-out prefix>=5 or exact seed-span events.
Reject contextual steering as a promotion path unless it beats null controls on held-out prefix>=5 or exact hits.
Keep depth 4 opt-in and sharded until this gate finds prefix>=6 movement, exact hits, or selected spans.
Keep remaining depth-4 shards gated unless a pilot or upstream lead produces prefix>=6, exact hits, or selected spans.
Do not promote span-3 hit bundling unless full-stream wins survive unrelated ordinary groups with null controls and non-comparable control density.
Do not promote salted expanders unless they beat equivalent random trials and create full-stream ordinary held-out wins with null controls.
Reject residual masks unless they generalize into prefix>=5 or exact hits.
Treat grammar-channel sidecar models as null until a parser-backed channel survives held-out/control promotion.
Stop broadening selected prefix-4 leads until a new family or deeper seed lane crosses prefix>=5 or exact-hit thresholds.
Do not run broad long-span bundle sweeps until the generated gate passes.
Change match-discovery strategy before returning to sidecar packing or format work.
Promote only after repeatable prefix>=5 uplift or exact seed-span hits on held-out data.
Treat parsed numeric value channels as null until exact seed spans survive full reconstruction metadata.
Find new independent match-discovery leads before more descriptor packing work.
Treat the current record-context lane as null until exact seed spans appear after metadata.
Do not generalize recursive v2 gains unless ordinary non-offset fixtures produce verified later-layer container wins.
Do not promote a public dictionary registry or format-level support until paired shadow controls and external corpora separate cleanly.
Do not promote residual steering until sidecar bytes plus metadata beat literal storage on held-out corpora.
Do not promote a public Lotus preset unless ordinary held-out negative groups reach the gate and controls remain null.
Keep format-transform and broad depth work gated until structural or successor transforms produce repeatable promotion signals.
Treat the current token-dictionary lane as null until exact seed spans appear after metadata.
Find a new transform family or deeper seed lane before promoting transform metadata.
Do not continue residual-sidecar promotion unless whole-stream vector rows produce unrelated ordinary held-out wins with controls null.
